positive: A mystical celestial map composition featuring ornate constellations and glowing nebulae, rendered in a Neo-Art Nouveau style. Central composition with strong, defined silhouettes of astronomical symbols (e.g., crescent moon, stylized planets, zodiac figures). The color palette is deep indigo, vibrant teal, electric lavender, and gold foil accents. Use high contrast lighting to make the glowing elements pop against a solid, dark cosmic void background. Vector-graphic quality, suitable for screen printing, intricate line work, symmetrical elements, clean edges, cosmic, elegant, mystic.
negative: blur, low quality, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, excessive noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, cropped, cartoon, photorealistic, jpeg artifacts, grain
